rationale: The cited paper is used as a canonical background reference on emotional content and virality in online WOM, including a grouped citation when defining emotional language and when noting that emotional content tends to be shared. The citing paper does not build its hypotheses on Berger and Milkman's specific mechanism, data, or empirical design. Instead, its core contribution is a different mechanism (smartphone-induced brevity and gist focus), so this citation serves contextual framing rather than a direct substantive dependency.
